title: Create music streaming app with playback, library, and playlists

requirements.text: Create a music library backend that stores songs with metadata including title, artist, album, duration, and audio file reference

quotes: Create a song app that can run on Android, like apps such as Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music

acceptanceCriteria: Backend can store and retrieve song metadata
Each song includes title, artist, album, duration fields
Songs can be queried by ID

requirements.text: Implement music player controls with play, pause, skip forward, and skip backward functionality

quotes: like apps such as Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music

acceptanceCriteria: Player displays currently playing song with title and artist
Play/pause button toggles playback state
Skip forward and backward buttons navigate between songs
Progress bar shows current playback position

requirements.text: Build a browsable music library interface showing songs, albums, and artists in organized views
acceptanceCriteria: Library view displays all available songs in a scrollable list
Albums view groups songs by album with album artwork
Artists view shows all artists with their songs
User can navigate between songs, albums, and artists views

requirements.text: Implement search functionality to find songs and artists by name

quotes: like apps such as Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music

acceptanceCriteria: Search bar accepts text input
Backend filters songs and artists matching search query
Search results display in real-time as user types
Results show both song titles and artist names

requirements.text: Create playlist management system allowing users to create, name, and add songs to custom playlists

quotes: like apps such as Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music

acceptanceCriteria: Users can create new playlists with custom names
Users can add songs to existing playlists
Users can view all songs in a playlist
Users can remove songs from playlists
Playlists persist across sessions

requirements.text: Design a mobile-optimized responsive interface with a cohesive modern music app visual theme featuring album artwork, smooth animations, and intuitive touch-friendly controls

quotes: can run on Android, like apps such as Spotify, JioSaavn, and YouTube Music

acceptanceCriteria: Interface adapts to mobile screen sizes
Touch targets are appropriately sized for mobile interaction
Visual design follows a consistent color scheme and typography
UI includes smooth transitions between views
Album artwork is prominently displayed where relevant

requirements.text: Display generated album artwork and artist images as static assets throughout the music library interface
acceptanceCriteria: Album covers display in the library view
Artist images appear in artist listings
Player interface shows current song's album artwork
Images load from frontend/public/assets/generated directory

constraints: Application must be built as a web application accessible on Android browsers, not a native Android app
Audio playback must use standard web audio APIs compatible with mobile browsers
All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor file
nonGoals: Native Android app development (APK/Play Store deployment)
Integration with external music streaming APIs like Spotify or Apple Music
Audio file uploading or storage beyond references
Social features like sharing or following other users

required: Modern abstract album cover with vibrant gradients suitable for electronic music (album-electronic.dim_400x400.png)
Album cover with acoustic guitar and warm earth tones for folk music (album-folk.dim_400x400.png)
Bold urban street art style album cover for hip-hop music (album-hiphop.dim_400x400.png)
Elegant classical music album cover with orchestral instruments (album-classical.dim_400x400.png)
Energetic rock music album cover with electric guitar imagery (album-rock.dim_400x400.png)
Minimalist portrait of a male artist in professional music studio setting (artist-male-1.dim_300x300.png)
Portrait of a female artist with headphones in recording booth (artist-female-1.dim_300x300.png)
